title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses infrastructure scaling at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, and challenges in AI-assisted coding. He reflects on engineering principles learned at Shopify and the characteristics required for exceptional infrastructure engineers in the AI era.
